Agent.Name: WeWork

Variable.Help: Get your webhook URL from a WeWork group robot.
Variable.Default: USE YOUR OWN WEBHOOK VALUE HERE

Variable.Help: Specify the fields which are included in the title of the notification.
Specify the fields which are included in the message body of the notification.

Agent.Script:
#!/bin/bash ############ {0} ############ # If this is a test run (EVENT=SUBJECT=DESCRIPTION all "X test."), fake real data if [ "$EVENT" = "$SUBJECT" ] && [ "$SUBJECT" = "$DESCRIPTION" ]; then EVENT="Array Start" SUBJECT="Array started successfully" DESCRIPTION="Array has been started successfully" CONTENT="All disks mounted normally. Parity is valid." IMPORTANCE="normal" TIMESTAMP="${TIMESTAMP:-$(date +%s)}" # Re-evaluate TITLE/MESSAGE from raw config templates with fake vars # (they were expanded with old env values during config sourcing) TITLE_TMPL=$(sed -n 's/^TITLE=//p' "$0" | tail -1) MESSAGE_TMPL=$(sed -n 's/^MESSAGE=//p' "$0" | tail -1) [ -n "$TITLE_TMPL" ] && TITLE=$(eval echo -e "$TITLE_TMPL") [ -n "$MESSAGE_TMPL" ] && MESSAGE=$(eval echo -e "$MESSAGE_TMPL") fi
# Expand \n sequences to actual newlines TITLE=$(printf '%b' "$TITLE") MESSAGE=$(printf '%b' "$MESSAGE")
case "$IMPORTANCE" in normal) EMOJI="🔵" ;; warning) EMOJI="⚠️" ;; alert) EMOJI="🚨" ;; *) EMOJI="🔵" ;; esac
# Format timestamp if present if [ -n "$TIMESTAMP" ]; then TS=$(date -d @"${TIMESTAMP}" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || date -r "${TIMESTAMP}" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || echo '') [ -n "$TS" ] && TIMESTAMP="$TS" fi
# Title: collapse to single line TITLE_LINE=$(printf '%s' "$TITLE" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ */ /g; s/^ *//; s/ *$//')
NL=$'\n'
# Build markdown_v2 content CONTENT="## ${EMOJI} [${IMPORTANCE}] ${APP_NAME}${NL}> ${TITLE_LINE}"
# Message body: prefix each non-empty line with "> " (continuous green bar) if [ -n "$MESSAGE" ]; then MSG_FORMATTED=$(printf '%s' "$MESSAGE" | sed '/./s/^/> /') CONTENT="${CONTENT}${NL}${MSG_FORMATTED}" fi
# Link (no blank line between to keep quote bar continuous) if [ -n "$LINK" ]; then CONTENT="${CONTENT}${NL}> [查看详情](${LINK})" fi
# JSON-encode ESCAPED=$(printf '%s' "$CONTENT" | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\\/\\\\/g;s/"/\\"/g;s/\n/\\n/g') PAYLOAD="{\"msgtype\":\"markdown_v2\",\"markdown_v2\":{\"content\":\"${ESCAPED}\"}}"
curl -s -X POST \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d "$PAYLOAD" \ --connect-timeout 5 --max-time 10 \ "$WEBH_URL" > /dev/null 2>&1
exit 0
